policies.name: Orphan Component Detection
policies.message: Component is orphaned: it has no incoming or outgoing dependencies.

policies.name: Core Features Require Decisions
policies.message: Core features must have at least one documented architectural decision.

policies.name: No Cyclic Dependencies
policies.message: Cyclic dependency detected. This violates the directed acyclic graph (DAG) principle.

policies.name: Workflows Must Belong To Features
policies.message: Workflow does not belong to any mapped Feature.
